Task.Name: SE-01 System Requirements Review (SRR)
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Downstream traceability work on SE-05 (RTM) is constrained by open interface requirements in SE-03 sections 4–6, which are blocked pending RF specifications from Hardware.

Task.Name: SE-02 System Design Document
Task.Notes:
BLOCKER: The remaining 15% depends on HW delivering RF interface specs before the CAM can complete the RF interface sections. | RISK: Same RF spec issue I mentioned — it's on HW to deliver. On my end, I've pre-staged the SDD and ICD sections so I can turn them around fast once I have the inputs. The PDR package itself is at 10%, but the bulk of that work is gated on the SDD and ICDs closing out anyway.
What would actually move the needle: get HW to commit to a firm delivery date for the RF specs this week, not end of next week. Every day of slip on their end compresses my turnaround time before the PDR gate.

Task.Name: SE-03 Interface Control Documents (ICDs)
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Sections 4 through 6 of the ICD are gated on RF specs that have been previously identified as a blocker. | RISK:

Task.Name: SE-04 CONOPS Development
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: CAM is intentionally sequencing CONOPS after RF specs and ICD direction are locked to ensure consistency with interface definitions, creating a self-imposed dependency delay. | RISK:

Task.Name: SE-05 Requirements Traceability Matrix
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: RTM progress is blocked by unfinalized RF interface definitions (ICD not yet closed), preventing traceability of RF-related requirements. | RISK:

Task.Name: SE-06 Preliminary Design Review (PDR) Package
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Substantive PDR package content is blocked on SDD and ICD closure, which are themselves held up by an unresolved RF spec issue. | RISK:

Task.Name: SE-07 System Safety Analysis
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: ICD approval is pending due to an unresolved RF spec issue, preventing finalization of the hazard analysis that requires confirmed interface definitions. | RISK:

Task.Name: SE-08 Reliability Analysis
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Reliability Analysis cannot start until the ICDs are approved due to an RF spec dependency. | RISK:

Task.Name: SE-09 Critical Design Review (CDR) Package
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: CDR package is blocked by an RF spec dependency cascading through upstream deliverables, and will not progress until the PDR gate closes.

Task.Name: SE-10 Verification & Validation Plan
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: V&V Plan is blocked by an upstream RF spec dependency cascading through the RTM and ICDs, which must close out before V&V Plan can begin.

Task.Name: HW-01 RF Front End Design
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Tool license contention on the lab cluster is backing up simulation runs, threatening an early May deadline that would cascade delays through the hardware acceptance chain if unresolved. | RISK: Two options: either procurement gets us two more simulation licenses — that's probably a two-week lead time minimum — or IT gives us priority queue access on the cluster so our jobs don't get bumped. Priority access is faster, could be done this week if someone makes the call. That's the ask.

Task.Name: HW-02 Signal Processing Board Design
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: A key engineer is on medical leave for approximately three weeks, with only partial coverage that is insufficient to maintain the original schedule pace. | RISK:

Task.Name: HW-03 Power Supply Design
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Power Supply Design is blocked upstream by delays on HW-01 and HW-02, which must deliver finalized RF and signal processing specs before this task can start. | RISK:

Task.Name: HW-04 Antenna Array Design
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: CAM is waiting on updated antenna aperture requirements from Alice's ICD update before the design can be finalized. | RISK:

Task.Name: HW-05 RF Front End Prototype Fabrication
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Task is blocked by an unresolved simulation issue in upstream task HW-01, which must clear before fabrication can start. | RISK:

Task.Name: HW-06 Signal Processing Board Fabrication
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Task has not started because it is downstream of HW-02, which is delayed due to a medical leave coverage issue affecting the board design pace.

Task.Name: HW-07 Antenna Array Fabrication
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Antenna Array Fabrication cannot start because it is downstream of HW-04 and blocked by an unresolved ICD issue that has left aperture requirements undefined and the design unfinalized.

Task.Name: HW-08 Hardware Unit Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Hardware Unit Testing is blocked by three unresolved upstream issues — a simulation problem, a medical leave staffing gap, and an ICD hold — all of which must clear before this task can begin.

Task.Name: HW-09 Environmental Stress Screening
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Three upstream blockers cascading from unit testing are preventing Environmental Stress Screening from starting.

Task.Name: HW-10 Hardware Acceptance Test
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Three unresolved blockers are holding up Hardware Acceptance Test and will cause the date to slip if any one of them is not resolved.

Task.Name: SW-02 Software Architecture Design
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Progress is dependent on hardware interface specs that have not yet been finalized.

Task.Name: SW-03 Signal Processing Algorithm Development
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: A hardware interface dependency is slowing progress on Signal Processing Algorithm Development until interface specifications are delivered.

Task.Name: SW-04 Tracking Algorithm Development
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Task is waiting on interface definitions from SW-02, expected to close out next week, which is gating further acceleration.

Task.Name: SW-05 User Interface Development
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: UI Development cannot start until SW-02 closes out due to an interface dependency.

Task.Name: SW-06 Database Design and Implementation
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: SW-02 dependency exists but has less impact on this task than on the algorithm work due to greater independence from full interface definitions.

Task.Name: SW-07 Software Unit Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Software Unit Testing cannot begin until predecessor coding tasks SW-03, SW-04, SW-05, and SW-06 reach sufficient maturity.

Task.Name: SW-08 Software Integration Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: SW-08 has a dependency on hardware availability for the integrated test bed, which is a coordination risk with the HW lead.

Task.Name: SW-09 Software Qualification Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Software Qualification Testing cannot begin until integration testing completes, as it is the last in the testing sequence.

Task.Name: IT-01 Integration Test Plan
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: IT-01 cannot be formally kicked off because the finalized test requirements documentation from the systems engineering team has not been received.

Task.Name: IT-02 Lab Setup and Calibration
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Equipment procurement is pending with no confirmed delivery date for calibration gear, and lab space has not been formally allocated by facilities.

Task.Name: IT-03 Hardware-Software Integration
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Hardware-Software Integration (IT-03) cannot start until IT-01 and IT-02 are both complete.

Task.Name: IT-04 System Functional Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: System Functional Testing is blocked because it is downstream of integration, which is itself blocked by previously described issues.

Task.Name: IT-05 System Performance Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Upstream blockers are preventing any progress on System Performance Testing.

Task.Name: IT-06 Environmental Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Upstream blockers (unspecified) are preventing any progress on Environmental Testing.

Task.Name: IT-07 Regression Testing
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Upstream blockers are preventing any progress on Regression Testing.

Task.Name: IT-08 Test Readiness Review
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Upstream blockers are preventing any progress on Test Readiness Review, and the CAM is refusing to continue the interview until baseline planned start dates are provided.

Task.Name: IT-09 Acceptance Test Procedure Development
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Upstream blockers are preventing any progress on Acceptance Test Procedure Development.

Task.Name: IT-10 System Acceptance Test
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Upstream blockers (previously described) are preventing any progress on System Acceptance Test.

Task.Name: PM-03 Monthly Status Reports
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: The second report is in draft and cannot be finalized until outstanding inputs are received from several CAMs.

Task.Name: PM-04 Earned Value Management Reporting
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: EVM reporting is blocked by a subcontractor data issue affecting its inputs.

Task.Name: PM-06 Subcontractor Management
Task.Notes: BLOCKER: Slow subcontractor data delivery is dragging down percent complete on this task.
